title: Armor Refurbished
description:
A small mod that reworks how armor is used in game by adding unique set bonuses, encouraging players to use diverse armors for different uses.
Also adds Emerald Armor, with a unique way of obtaining it.
body:
**!!The mod file is named "Minecraft Refurbished", thats just because when I was origonally working on it this mod was meant to be a whole lot bigger than it is and I can't really change the file name anymore!!**

_I lost the files for this mod when I got my new pc, so there isn't gonna be updates in the forseeable future._

_That being said im still proud of the work I did here, so I'd appriciate it if you take a look and plus I'll probably make new mods, so if you like it then go ahead and follow the mod and check back in like a few months to see if theres anything new!_

 
+=----------------------------------------------------------------------------------=+
 

At the moment, this mod includes added Set Bonuses to gear, which add some effects if you have a full armor set of one kind of gear, a new Emerald Armor Set, and a new Villager Profession, and 2 new Advancements.

- **Leather Armor Set Bonus:**
 The lightweight leather makes you feel light as a feather, giving you speed and jump boost 1

- **Chainmail Armor Set Bonus:**
 The smart design of the interlinked chains make it so projectiles of all kinds cant harm you (you still take knockback from them though)

- **Iron Armor Set Bonus:**
 The Iron armor takes inspiration from the tough Iron Golem, causing you to gain an extra 2 hearts but move with slowness 2
 
- **Gold Armor Set Bonus:**
 Greed fills your heart as you wear this flashy armor, causing you to seek out better loot, you gain luck 2 giving you better chest and fishing loot luck
 
- **Diamond Armor Set Bonus:**
The diamond armor is made for true cavers, allowing you to mine faster with haste 1 but also taking away some of your combative strength with weakness 1 in return
 
- **Netherite Armor Set Bonus:**
 The netherite plating that originates from deep within the hot depths allows protection against fire, but not against lava. However it also slowly corrodes away while in a cold environment (taiga biomes, deep oceans, mountains, and the end)
 
- **Emerald Armor Set Bonus:**
 The villagers love your new classy gear so much, they sell things for cheaper to you with Hero of the Village 1

+=----------------------------------------------------------------------------------=+

The new 'Mr Moneybags' Villager Profession will give you emeralds for all sorts of rare ores and minerals, and is also the only way to obtain the Emerald Armor Set, selling two of the four pieces of the set to you at max level.

The Emerald Armor both defense-wise and durability-wise is just above iron armor, putting it between iron and diamond in flat out use.

 

+=----------------------------------------------------------------------------------=+

The first added Advancement is called 'Childhood Complete' and is achieved by obtaining a full set of Emerald Armor.

The second Advancement is called 'My Armor!' and is achieved by having your netherite armor begin to corrode away in a cold biome.
